title: `anaq #6059
definition:
1) to serve as a necklace, adorn with a neck ornament
    1a) (Qal) to serve as a necklace
    1b) (Hiphil) to make a necklace
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal) to serve as a necklace
    1b) (Hiphil) to make a necklace
